{{ report.missing_2fa }}

Missing 2FA Tag

Suggestions

Use unique passwords for each site.

Add `2FA` or `TOTP` in tags for accounts protected by two-factor login.

Update old passwords every 6-12 months for important accounts.

Keep at least one encrypted `.svault` backup outside your PC.
